Question: Which of the following passages is the original verbatim passage? The other passages are paraphrased versions of it.

Options:
A. The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences (AMPAS) held the 95th Academy Awards on March 12, 2023, in Los Angeles, honoring films released in 2022. The event was televised in the U.S. by ABC and produced by Ricky Kirshner and Glenn Weiss, who were also the director. Jimmy Kimmel hosted the show for the third time, after emceeing the 89th and 90th editions of the ceremony in 2017 and 2018, respectively. B. The 95th Academy Awards was a ceremony held by the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences (AMPAS) on March 12, 2023, at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles, which honored films released in 2022.The event was televised in the U.S. by ABC and was produced by Ricky Kirshner and Glenn Weiss. Weiss was also the director. Comedian and late-night talk show host Jimmy Kimmel hosted the show for the third time, after emceeing the 89th and 90th editions of the ceremony in 2017 and 2018, respectively.Everything Everywhere All at Once led the ceremony with eleven nominations and seven wins, including Best Picture, Best Director and Best Original Screenplay for Daniel Kwan and Daniel Scheinert, and three of the four acting awards. C. The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences (AMPAS) organized the 95th Academy Awards, an event that took place on March 12, 2023, at the Dolby Theatre located in Los Angeles. This ceremony served to recognize and celebrate motion pictures that were released during the year 2022. In the United States, ABC broadcasted the event live on television. Ricky Kirshner and Glenn Weiss were responsible for producing the show, with Weiss also taking on the role of director. The ceremony's host was Jimmy Kimmel, a well-known comedian and host of a late-night talk show. This marked his third time hosting the prestigious awards, having previously hosted the 89th and 90th iterations of the event in 2017 and 2018, respectively. The film "Everything Everywhere All at Once" garnered the most attention at the ceremony, receiving eleven nominations and ultimately securing seven victories. These wins included significant categories such as Best Picture, Best Director, and Best Original Screenplay, the latter two going to Daniel Kwan and Daniel Scheinert. Furthermore, the movie also earned three out of the four acting accolades. Among the other films that received awards was "All Quiet on the Western Front."

Answer:
